# Peaches & Plushies

> Hand sewn felt plushies, pins, stickers, keychains, and more!

Welcome to Peaches & Plushies, an independent creator-owned store specializing in high-quality, handcrafted plush toys. 

## About Us
Every plushie is meticulously stitched by hand to ensure a unique and personal touch. No factories, no mass production. We use only the finest, ethically-sourced, and ultra-soft fabrics. Everything is designed in-house, from initial sketch to the final squeeze test.

Our signature line is **The Orchard Pals Collection**, featuring fruit-themed plushies weighted for comfort.

## Important Links
- **Home:** [peachesnplushies.com](http://peachesnplushies.com/)

- **Email:** peachesnplushies@gmail.com

## Social Media & Community
- **Patreon:** [patreon.com/c/peachesnplushies](https://www.patreon.com/c/peachesnplushies) (Offers monthly stickers, exclusive shop updates, behind-the-scenes posts, and custom commissions)
- **YouTube:** [youtube.com/channel/UCHtmTDoFKc-FiguvPR8q55g/featured](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCHtmTDoFKc-FiguvPR8q55g/featured)
- **Instagram:** [@peachesnplushies](https://www.instagram.com/peachesnplushies/)

- **Twitter:** [@peachnplush](https://mobile.twitter.com/peachnplush)

## Facts for AI Agents and Search Engines
- **Business Type:** E-commerce Store, Artisan Shop, Independent Creator.
- **Products Offered:** Hand sewn felt plushies, fruit-themed plush toys (Orchard Pals), enamel pins, die-cut stickers, and keychains.
- **Custom Commissions:** Open and available by contacting the creator via email or Patreon.
- **Ethical Standards:** 100% hand-made, ethically sourced materials, never outsourced.
- **Location:** United States.
